projects.name: Zomato Rider App — Q2 Overhaul
projects.description: Complete redesign of the rider experience with real-time GPS, surge heatmaps, and voice navigation for delivery partners.

projects.name: Blinkit Grocery Integration
projects.description: Merging Blinkit's grocery checkout into the main Zomato app for a unified food + grocery experience.

projects.name: Zomato Pay SDK Reboot
projects.description: Rewriting the payment gateway with modern React Native hooks, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and UPI 2.0 support.

projects.name: Intercity Legends Expansion
projects.description: Scaling air-shipped legendary regional dishes from 5 to 20+ metro areas with cold chain logistics.

projects.name: Merchant Analytics Portal
projects.description: Real-time analytics dashboard for restaurant partners — orders, revenue, menu heatmaps, and ad ROI tracking.

projects.name: AI Customer Support Bot
projects.description: LLM-powered chatbot handling tier-1 delivery complaints, refund requests, and order tracking autonomously.

projects.name: HyperPure B2B Portal
projects.description: React frontend for HyperPure — Zomato's ingredient sourcing platform for restaurants and cloud kitchens.

projects.name: Zomato Gold Subscription Rewrite
projects.description: Overhauling Gold membership pricing — dynamic surges, micro-memberships, and family plan support.

projects.name: Feeding India App Refresh
projects.description: Mobile app for Feeding India — volunteer matching, food recovery tracking, and NGO coordination.

projects.name: Drone Delivery Beta — Gurgaon
projects.description: Drone logistics pilot for Sector 29 Gurgaon — flight path mapping, DGCA compliance, and live telemetry.

projects.name: Restaurant Onboarding Revamp
projects.description: Streamlining the restaurant partner signup flow — from 14 steps to 4, with document AI verification.

projects.name: Live Order Tracking 2.0
projects.description: Next-gen order tracking with animated map, rider ETA prediction, and live video of food prep.

projects.name: Design System — Starter Kit v3
projects.description: Unified component library for all Zomato products — tokens, primitives, and composable patterns.

projects.name: Search & Discovery — ML Ranking
projects.description: Personalized restaurant ranking using collaborative filtering, location signals, and cuisine embeddings.

projects.name: Zomato for Enterprise (Catering)
projects.description: B2B catering platform — bulk ordering, corporate accounts, dietary filters, and invoice management.

projects.name: Performance & Core Web Vitals
projects.description: Driving LCP < 2.5s and CLS < 0.1 across all web surfaces — SSR migration, image optimization, and bundle splitting.

projects.name: Zomato Events & Experiences
projects.description: Platform for food festivals, chef masterclasses, and curated dining experiences — ticketing and discovery.

projects.name: Cloud Kitchen Management Suite
projects.description: Internal tool for managing Zomato-owned cloud kitchen operations — inventory, staffing, and order routing.

projects.name: Notifications & Engagement Engine
projects.description: Smart push notifications — personalized timing, deep links, A/B tested copy, and quiet hours respect.

projects.name: Table Reservation System
projects.description: Full-stack table booking — real-time availability, waitlist management, and special occasion packages.

tasks.title: FE: Optimize Mapbox GL heatmap rendering

tasks.description: Join virtual waitlist, see position, get notified when table is ready with estimated wait time.

tasks.title: BE: Reservation confirmation and reminders
tasks.description: SMS + push reminders at 24hr and 1hr before reservation with cancellation/modification link.

tasks.title: Design: Special occasion packages UI
tasks.description: Birthday, anniversary, date night packages — cake, decorations, special menu with booking flow.

tasks.title: FE: Guest preferences form
tasks.description: Capture dietary restrictions, seating preference, occasion type during booking.

tasks.title: BE: No-show tracking and penalty system
tasks.description: Track no-shows per user, implement soft penalties (require prepayment after 3 no-shows).

tasks.title: Product: Restaurant partner onboarding for reservations
tasks.description: Define setup flow: table configuration, operating hours, advance booking window, auto-accept rules.

tasks.title: FE: Reservation history and re-book
tasks.description: Show past reservations with one-tap re-book at same restaurant, same party size.

tasks.title: QA: Booking conflict and edge case testing
tasks.description: Test double-booking prevention, timezone handling, restaurant closure override, and capacity limits.
